name: Ilthisarian
ranged: static arc pistol +9 (1d6+4 E; critical arc 2)
skills: Athletics +15 (+23 to swim), Engineering +15, Intimidate +10, Physical Science +10, Survival +15
gear: casual stationwear, static arc pistol with battery (20 charges)

special_abilities.name: Deadly Grasp (Ex)
special_abilities.description: When an ilthisarian succeeds at a combat maneuver to maintain a grapple, it can make a melee attack with its bite as a move action.

special_abilities.name: Redundant Vitals (Ex)
special_abilities.description: Ilthisarian receive a +4 racial bonus to saving throws against effects that target specific organs, such as the wound and severe wound critical hit effects.

description: Ilthisarians are multiheaded, serpentlike humanoids with forked tails instead of legs. Though they are most comfortable in the marshy environments of the planet Arshalin (see page 44), ilthisarians can remain active in a wide range of climates.

Special Abilities
Deadly Grasp (Ex)
When an ilthisarian succeeds at a combat maneuver to maintain a grapple, it can make a melee attack with its bite as a move action.
Redundant Vitals (Ex)
Ilthisarian receive a +4 racial bonus to saving throws against effects that target specific organs, such as the wound and severe wound critical hit effects.
Description
Ilthisarians are multiheaded, serpentlike humanoids with forked tails instead of legs. Though they are most comfortable in the marshy environments of the planet Arshalin (see page 44), ilthisarians can remain active in a wide range of climates.
